diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,157 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono class extending HonoBase, providing default router configuration (SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter fallback)
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema
+- Simple note: Entry point for Hono - constructor auto-initializes SmartRouter, delegates to HonoBase for middleware and composition support
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Core Hono base class handling request dispatching, middleware composition, routing, mounting, handlers, path merging
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, Hono, Context, Router, Methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH, ALL), compose, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, COMPOSED_HANDLER constant, SmartRouter, HonoOptions, strict mode, Env types, FetchEventLike, Request, Response, MiddlewareHandler, RouterRoute
+- Simple note: Implements full request lifecycle - stores routes via .routes, adds routes via #addRoute, dispatches requests via #dispatch using router.match, supports app.mount, app.route, app.basePath, app.onError, app.notFound
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module entry point for PatternRouter
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter
+- Simple note: Single-line re-export from ./router
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Pattern-based router using compiled RegEx for route matching, supports static paths, named params (:name), wildcards (*), and optional params with ? suffix
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, METHOD_NAME_ALL, emptyParams, Route type ([RegExp, string, T]), add() - compiles path pattern to RegEx with /?$ suffix for optional params, match() - iterates #routes array testing RegEx matches, returns handlers with parsed params
+- Simple note: Each route compiled to RegEx at add-time for O(1) matching; does not support :label{pattern} regex capture groups
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module entry point for LinearRouter
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter
+- Simple note: Single-line re-export from ./router
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Linear O(n) route matching router supporting static paths, named params (:name), and wildcards (*)
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, UnsupportedPathError, METHOD_NAME_ALL, checkOptionalParameter, emptyParams, RegExpMatchArrayWith, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe
+- Simple note: Routes stored as string templates upfront; match iterates all sequentially comparing paths; handles :name segments with optional {pattern}, processes * wildcard via incremental string matching; throws UnsupportedPathError on conflicts
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module entry point exporting RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
+- Simple note: Re-exports RegExpRouter with PreparedRegExpRouter and serialization helpers for router-as-string usage
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Builds compiled RegEx router from registered routes, supports static routes, wildcards, named params with pattern constraints, handles middleware
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, PATH_ERROR, paramCount, nullMatcher, wildcardRegExpCache, buildWildcardRegExp, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, findMiddleware, buildAllMatchers, #buildMatcher
+- Simple note: Routes stored during registration, compiled once to RegEx using intermediate Trie structure; static routes placed before dynamic; throws UnsupportedPathError on ambiguous patterns
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Executes RegEx matching and parameter extraction
+- Names noticed: match, emptyParam, Result, ParamIndexMap, ParamStash, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, METHOD_NAME_ALL, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT
+- Simple note: Two-phase lookup - static match wins if exact path registered, otherwise RegEx match and index-based param resolution via ParamIndexMap
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Pre-compiled RegEx router from serialized string for read-optimized runtime
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, RelocateMap, MatcherMap, StaticMap, HandlerData, RegExpRouter
+- Simple note: buildInitParams builds initial matchers from known routes and produces serialized string; add() updates in-memory matchers; read path must be pre-registered or throws runtime error
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie node class for RegEx router path structure
+- Names noticed: Node, Context, PathError symbol, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, ParamAssocArray, compareKey
+- Simple note: insert() traverses path tokens, creates child nodes or uses existing RegEx nodes, tracks param varIndex for label params, buildRegExpStr() generates final RegEx with named capture group indexes
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie root wrapper that normalizes paths and delegates to Node
+- Names noticed: Trie, Node, Context, ParamAssocArray, ReplacementMap, PathError symbol
+- Simple note: insert() converts {pattern} groups to tokens, delegates to root Node.insert(), buildRegExp() converts RegEx to final compiled pattern with handlerId and param index maps
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module entry point for SmartRouter
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter
+- Simple note: Single-line re-export from ./router
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Router that dynamically composes multiple routers (RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, etc.)
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, UnsupportedPathError, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, add, match, activeRouter
+- Simple note: Wrapper router - routes pushed then delegated to first registered sub-router; on successful match fixes .match binding to that router and breaks; fallback is error if no router matched
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module entry point for TrieRouter
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Single-line re-export from ./router
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Trie-based router with O(log n) lookup, supports static paths, named params (:name), wildcards (*)
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, checkOptionalParameter
+- Simple note: constructor creates new Node; add() delegates to node.insert() via checkOptionalParameter split; match() delegates to node.search()
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie node implementing path tree with method/handler branching and wildcard support
+- Names noticed: Node, METHOD_NAME_ALL, emptyParams, Pattern, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, hasChildren, getPattern
+- Simple note: insert() builds tree by path, assigns handler under node key, uses score for ordering; search() does queue traversal matching static/pattern children, merges params, uses * for catch-all wildcard; returns handlers sorted by score
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Shared test infrastructure for router testing
+- Names noticed: task, runTest, RunnerTestSuite, RunnerTestSuite hierarchy
+- Simple note: Factory function runTest({ newRouter, skip[] }) - creates router instance and runs common test cases parameterized by skip list; test cases cover basic usage, reserved words, complex paths, registration order, duplicate param names, multi-match, stars, optional routes, all methods, long prefix with stars, including slashes, capture groups, unknown method
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for PatternRouter implementation
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, describe, it
+- Simple note: Skips Duplicate param name tests (causes UnsupportedPathError), Trailing slash test allowed (PatternRouter permits `/book/` vs other routers reject it)
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for LinearRouter implementation
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, describe, beforeEach, it
+- Simple note: Skips Multi match params test, Capture regex with trailing wildcard, Complex Parameter with .*, Trailing slash test; verifies basic usage, static/dynamic path matching, wildcard handling
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for RegExpRouter implementation
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, describe, it
+- Simple note: Skips parent/child duplicate param tests, capturing group tests, Parameter with {.*}, including slashes test; tests return type, extensive UnsupportedPathError scenarios, basic RegEx matching and param extraction
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Integration tests for SmartRouter
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest, describe, it
+- Simple note: Uses composite [RegExpRouter, TrieRouter]; skips all tests via runTest skip mechanism verifying composite matches all common cases
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Integration tests for TrieRouter
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest, describe, it
+- Simple note: Runs all common cases via runTest without skips; verifies TrieRouter passes all shared test scenarios
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for Trie node internal behavior
+- Names noticed: Node, describe, it, expect
+- Simple note: Tests root node creation, method * matching, named param and wildcard paths, RegEx constraint validation, multi-match handler resolution, sort order by score, duplicate param name handling, static vs dynamic route collision, star wildcard edge cases
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+
+## File Paths Document
+1. src/hono.ts
+2. src/hono-base.ts
+3. src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+4. src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+5. src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+6. src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+7. src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+8. src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+9. src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+10. src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+11. src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+12. src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+13. src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+14. src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+15. src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+16. src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+17. src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+18. src/router/common.case.test.ts
+19. src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+20. src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+21. src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+22. src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+23. src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+24. src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+
+## Output File Report
+Only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
